why: Preserves secondary treatment concepts from a long review abstract: acute migraine treatment, sumatriptan, NSAIDs, acetaminophen, magnesium sulfate, and dihydroergotamine.
Preserves the main cancer topic plus secondary biomarker, targeted therapy, progression-free survival, and brain metastasis concepts.
Preserves C. difficile infection, diarrhea, antibiotic therapy, vancomycin, and antibiotic exposure from a review abstract.
Preserves SLE, lupus nephritis, preeclampsia, proteinuria, and complement levels across case-series wording.
Preserves large vessel occlusion, expressive aphasia, tenecteplase, and mechanical thrombectomy from an acute stroke abstract.
Preserves COVID-19, ARDS, septic shock, and acute kidney injury from a management abstract.
Preserves CYP2C19, poor metabolizer status, clopidogrel, ticagrelor, and PCI from a meta-analysis abstract.
